description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow surrounded by a dense row of tall, conical evergreen trees forming a natural privacy barrier. The exterior walls are clad in a textured, brown brick finish, and the structure features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade includes a gated driveway with a visible red car parked under a covered area, and a sleek, horizontal metal gate with stone pillars. The flat roof design is complemented by a mix of open and partially enclosed rooftop spaces, some of which appear to be terraces or balconies. The landscaping is meticulously maintained, with a lush green lawn and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story brick bungalow with large windows, flat roof, and surrounded by tall evergreen trees and a gated driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, gated driveway, red car, and prominent floor-to-ceiling windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, grouped windows, and the dense row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive windows, flat roof, and the continuous tree barrier enclosing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible terrace, more windows, and the tree-lined perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on all facades
